zh.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, F: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾圖希
zh.lifeSummary: 當Itier IV de Toucy於1169年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾圖希時，他的父親Nargeot de Toucy40歲，母親Agnès de Dampierre39歲。他於1206年與Béatrix de Rion結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1219年在巴勒斯坦享年50歲。

zh-hans.Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, F: 法国布格-福朗-可特艾圖希
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Itier IV de Toucy于1169年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾圖希时，他的父亲Nargeot de Toucy40岁，母亲Agnès de Dampierre39岁。他于1206年与Béatrix de Rion结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1219年在巴勒斯坦享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Cecile, Lucien, Gilles, Normand, Marcel, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Paul, Laurent, Alphonse.
French: habitational name from Soucy, the name of several places in various parts of France.

variants.name: Soucie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Ludger, Pierre.

nameMeanings.name: Itier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Itter near Waldeck in Hesse.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Itier IV de Toucy was born in 1169, in Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Nargeot de Toucy, was 40 and his mother, Agnès de Dampierre, was 39. He married Béatrix de Rion in 1206. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1219, in Palestine, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Itier IV de Toucy est né en 1169, à Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Nargeot de Toucy, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Dampierre, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Béatrix de Rion en 1206. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1219, à Palestine, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Itier IV de Toucy 1169 in Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nargeot de Toucy 40 und seine Mutter Agnès de Dampierre 39. Er hat 1206 Béatrix de Rion geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1219 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Itier IV de Toucy è nato il nel 1169 nel Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Nargeot de Toucy, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Dampierre, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Béatrix de Rion nel 1206. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1219, nel Palestina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Itier IV de Toucyが1169年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeイオントウシで生まれた時，父Nargeot de Toucyは40歳，母Agnès de Dampierreは39歳であった。1206年にBéatrix de Rionと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1219年にパレスチナで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Itier IV de Toucy(이)가 1169년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 욘 토우시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nargeot de Toucy(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Dampierre(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1206년 Béatrix de Rion(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1219년 팔레스타인에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Itier IV de Toucy nasceu em 1169, em Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Nargeot de Toucy, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Dampierre, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Béatrix de Rion em 1206. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1219, em Palestina, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Itier IV de Toucy родился в 1169 г. в местности тоуси, енн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Nargeot de Toucy было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Dampierre, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Béatrix de Rion в 1206 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1219 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Itier IV de Toucy nació en 1169, en Toucy, Yonne, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Nargeot de Toucy, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnès de Dampierre, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Béatrix de Rion en 1206. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1219, en Palestina, a la edad de 50 años.
